recommendations.overall_recommendation_summary: To improve your CV and job matching for the Senior Developer position, focus on developing the required technical skills, enhancing the clarity and organization of your CV, and gaining relevant work experience.

cv_improvement_recommendations.title: Organize Technical Skills
cv_improvement_recommendations.recommendation: Group your technical skills into categories such as Programming Languages, Frameworks, and Tools to enhance clarity.
cv_improvement_recommendations.reason: The current skills section lacks organization, making it difficult for recruiters to quickly identify your competencies.
cv_improvement_recommendations.evidence: The CV quality analysis indicates that the skills section lacks clear organization and grouping.

cv_improvement_recommendations.title: Add Measurable Results to Projects
cv_improvement_recommendations.recommendation: Include measurable outcomes or impacts for each project to demonstrate effectiveness and contributions.
cv_improvement_recommendations.reason: Measurable results can significantly enhance the impact of your projects and show potential employers the value you can bring.
cv_improvement_recommendations.evidence: The CV quality analysis notes that no measurable results or quantifiable achievements are provided in project descriptions.

cv_improvement_recommendations.title: Include Relevant Work Experience
cv_improvement_recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding any relevant internships or work experience to enhance the CV's completeness.
cv_improvement_recommendations.reason: The job posting requires significant experience, which is currently missing from your CV, making it a weak match for the position.
cv_improvement_recommendations.evidence: The CV does not provide any work experience, which is critical for the responsibilities of a Senior Developer role.

soft_skills_recommendations.title: Evidencing Additional Soft Skills
soft_skills_recommendations.recommendation: Consider providing examples of how you have resolved team conflicts or demonstrated customer service skills in your projects or coursework.
soft_skills_recommendations.reason: The job posting emphasizes the importance of soft skills such as conflict resolution and customer service, which are not clearly evidenced in your CV.
soft_skills_recommendations.evidence: The CV shows strong communication and teamwork but lacks evidence for other soft skills required for the position.

priority_actions.action: Develop required technical skills such as C#, ASP.NET, and JavaScript through online courses or projects.
priority_actions.expected_impact: This will address the significant gaps in required skills for the Senior Developer position, improving job match potential.

priority_actions.action: Organize and enhance your CV by grouping skills and adding measurable results to projects.
priority_actions.expected_impact: Improving CV clarity and impact will make it more appealing to recruiters and increase your chances of being considered for roles.

priority_actions.action: Seek internships or relevant work experience to build your professional background in software development.
priority_actions.expected_impact: Gaining practical experience will help meet the job's experience requirements and strengthen your overall profile.

evidence_based_notes: The candidate's CV does not provide any work experience, which is critical for the responsibilities of a Senior Developer role.
The job posting requires significant experience in software development, which the candidate lacks.
The candidate demonstrates some soft skills through university projects, but other soft skills such as conflict resolution and customer service are not clearly evidenced.
